units.title: Generative AI and Large Language Models
units.description: Transformer architectures, prompt engineering, RAG, hallucination mitigation, and responsible LLM deployment.

units.title: Software Supply Chain Security
units.description: SBOM generation, dependency vulnerability scanning, provenance verification, CI/CD pipeline security, and policy-as-code.

units.title: Cloud Native Systems and Infrastructure
units.description: Container orchestration with Kubernetes, microservices, serverless computing, distributed tracing, and SLOs.

units.title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning
units.description: Supervised/unsupervised learning, neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, model training and evaluation pipelines.

units.title: Software Engineering
units.description: Agile development, design patterns, testing, CI/CD, and software lifecycle management.

units.title: Database Systems and Data Engineering
units.description: Relational and NoSQL databases, query optimization, data pipelines, and vector databases.

units.title: Computer Networks
units.description: TCP/IP, routing, SDN, network programming, and wireless networking.

units.title: Embedded Systems and IoT
units.description: Microcontroller programming, RTOS, sensor interfacing, and IoT protocols.

units.title: Machine Learning for Signal Processing
units.description: Deep learning applied to signals, time-series, images, and sensor fusion.

units.title: AI and Generative Models in EE
units.description: Transformer architectures, LLM fine-tuning, and generative AI for engineering applications.

units.title: Cyber-Physical Systems Security
units.description: SCADA security, firmware vulnerability analysis, hardware trojans, and embedded security.

units.title: Cloud Computing for Engineering
units.description: Cloud platforms for engineering workloads, containerized simulation, and HPC on cloud.

units.title: VLSI and Hardware Acceleration
units.description: CMOS design, FPGA, custom AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design.

units.title: Robotics and Autonomous Systems
units.description: Robot kinematics/dynamics, motion planning, ROS2, autonomous navigation, and human-robot interaction.

units.title: AI and ML in Mechanical Systems
units.description: Machine learning for predictive maintenance, digital twins, generative design, and process optimization.

units.title: Digital Manufacturing and Industry 4.0
units.description: CNC programming, additive manufacturing, smart factory, IIoT, and cobots.

units.title: Computational Mechanics and Simulation
units.description: FEA, CFD, multibody dynamics simulation, and high-performance computing for engineering.

units.title: Control Systems and Mechatronics
units.description: Classical and modern control, state-space methods, PID tuning, and mechatronic system design.

units.title: Geospatial Data and GIS
units.description: GIS, remote sensing, spatial data analysis, and AI-driven infrastructure monitoring.

units.title: Smart Infrastructure and IoT Sensors
units.description: Structural health monitoring, IoT sensor networks, and real-time data pipelines for civil infrastructure.

units.title: Transportation Systems and Autonomous Vehicles
units.description: Traffic modeling, connected and autonomous vehicles, smart traffic control, and mobility data analytics.

units.title: Sustainable Construction Technologies
units.description: Green building materials, energy-efficient design, lifecycle assessment, and sustainable construction methods.

units.title: ML for Process Optimization
units.description: Machine learning, deep learning, and data-driven process control for chemical manufacturing.

units.title: Process Control and Automation
units.description: PID control, model predictive control, distributed control systems, and plant automation.

units.title: Sustainable Energy and Green Chemistry
units.description: Renewable energy processes, carbon capture, green hydrogen, and circular economy principles.

units.title: Computational Chemistry and Molecular Simulation
units.description: Molecular dynamics, DFT, high-throughput screening, and AI for materials discovery.

units.title: Autonomous Flight and UAV Systems
units.description: UAV design, path planning, computer vision for navigation, and swarm systems.

units.title: Guidance, Navigation and Control
units.description: State estimation, Kalman filtering, trajectory optimization, and GNC system integration.

units.title: Computational Aerodynamics
units.description: Computational fluid dynamics, mesh generation, turbulence modeling, and high-fidelity simulation.

units.title: Satellite Systems and Space Technology
units.description: CubeSat design, orbital mechanics, ground station software, and space data systems.

units.title: Medical AI and Image Analysis
units.description: Deep learning for medical imaging, FDA-regulated AI, explainability, and clinical validation.

units.title: Wearable Health Monitoring
units.description: Biosensor design, signal processing, real-time health analytics, and edge AI for health.

units.title: Bioinformatics and Genomics
units.description: Genome sequencing pipelines, variant calling, single-cell analysis, and multi-omics integration.

units.title: Neural Engineering and Brain-Computer Interfaces
units.description: Neural signal acquisition, BCI system design, neural decoding, and closed-loop systems.

units.title: Supply Chain Analytics and Optimization
units.description: Data-driven supply chain design, demand forecasting, inventory optimization, and logistics AI.

units.title: Human-Robot Collaboration
units.description: Collaborative robot (cobot) integration, human factors, safety standards, and AI-assisted automation.

units.title: Digital Twin and Simulation
units.description: Discrete-event simulation, digital twin architecture, process optimization, and real-time synchronization.

units.title: Data-Driven Quality Engineering
units.description: Statistical process control, Six Sigma, machine learning for defect detection, and quality 4.0.

units.title: ML for Reservoir Engineering
units.description: Machine learning for reservoir characterization, production optimization, and decline curve analysis.

units.title: Digital Oilfield and IIoT
units.description: Sensor networks in oil fields, real-time drilling optimization, and edge computing for remote operations.

units.title: Reservoir Simulation
units.description: Numerical simulation of fluid flow, history matching, and high-performance computing for reservoir modeling.
